top_signals.title: Fed's Cook Says She's Ready to Raise Rates If Inflation Lingers
top_signals.summary: "The risks remain tilted toward higher inflation," Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook says during an event at Stanford University. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Investors Say It’s Time for Pemex to Tap Global Debt Markets
top_signals.summary: Investors say the time is right for state-owned Petroleos Mexicanos SA to sell global bonds for the first time in more than three years.

top_signals.title: President von der Leyen at EU-Mexico summit: "We are taking our partnership to a whole new level"
top_signals.summary:
European Commission News Brussels, 27 May 2026 
President of the European Commission, Ursula von der Leyen, participated in the EU-Mexico Summit in Mexico City on 22 May 2026, alongside Mexican President Cla...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Zscaler tanks 31% for worst day ever on 'prudent' guidance, sales shakeup
top_signals.summary: Zscaler has shed half its value over the last year.

top_signals.title: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
top_signals.summary: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
